creator: peter.henderson@ieee.org
text:
Cannot upgrade devel/gdb6 from gdb-6.6_1 to gdb-6.6_2.

It looks like it isn't looking for libreadline, rather than libreadline_p.

Using "portupgrade -a > portupograde.log 2>&1" get

///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////

--->  Upgrading 'gdb-6.6_1' to 'gdb-6.6_2' (devel/gdb6)
--->  Building '/usr/ports/devel/gdb6'
===>  Cleaning for gdb-6.6_2
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
===>  Extracting for gdb-6.6_2
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for gdb-6.6.tar.bz2.
===>  Patching for gdb-6.6_2
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for gdb-6.6_2
echo 'READLINE = -lreadline' >> /usr/ports/devel/gdb6/work/gdb-6.6/gdb/Makefile.in
===>   gdb-6.6_2 depends on executable: gmake - found
===>   gdb-6.6_2 depends on shared library: iconv.3 - found
===>   gdb-6.6_2 depends on shared library: intl - found
===>  Configuring for gdb-6.6_2
